name: indi-focuser-PETG-gears
description: PETG settings for herringbone gears — higher infill, slower walls for tooth accuracy. Part of the indi-focuser-esp32s3 project.
notes: Slower outer wall speed improves gear tooth surface finish and dimensional accuracy. Use textured PEI plate. For: focuser knob gear, motor pinion, drive gear, friction sleeve. DRY YOUR FILAMENT before printing gears — wet PETG strings between teeth.
